title: My Updated EMA Settings! Impossible to Lose with THIS Strategy!
thesis_bullets: The name of this setup is double 8.
It gives you the most accurate bicep signals ever.
It's very easy and you just need to follow my instruction.
Alright, we need to add four exponential moving averages and we're gonna give them special settings and combination.
Alright, here we click on indicators and we search Reben, this one, moving average Reben.
When you add this indicator, automatically four moving averages are added to the chart and now we need to change their settings.
So here we go to the settings of the Reben and first here for the moving average type, we set exponential moving average for them because as I said, we need four exponential moving averages.
So here we set EMA for them and then for the first EMA, we set the length at eight and for the second EMA, we also set the length at eight.
For the first EMA here for the source of calculation, we set it at high and for the second one, we set it based on low.
So here we have two EMAs with the same length of eight, but one of them is based on high and the other one is based on low.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 1h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 1h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
